data.title: Green Oleo: Resilient Mix-Driven Growth in High-Potential Niches Supports Upside and Confirms Buy Rating
data.description:
Analyst Silvestro Bonora of Intermonte maintained a Buy rating on Green Oleo S.P.A., with a price target of €1.15.

Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Silvestro Bonora has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors tied to Green Oleo’s resilient top line and strategic positioning in attractive niches. Despite weaker volumes and compressed margins in FY25, the company managed to preserve revenues through a richer product mix, with personal care showing particularly strong expansion, and working capital and capex remaining under control.

At the same time, Bonora emphasizes Green Oleo’s exposure to structurally growing European markets such as palm‑oil‑free oleochemicals, cosmetic ingredients, biolubricants and other specialty applications, which together represent a sizeable addressable opportunity. Even after cutting 2026‑28 EBITDA forecasts to reflect a tougher macro and geopolitical backdrop, his updated target price of €1.15 still implies a substantial upside versus the current share price, justifying the confirmation of a Buy recommendation.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk

data.title: Haizhi: Leveraging Graph-Enhanced AI Agents for High-Growth Expansion and Buy-Rated Upside to HK$84.5
data.description:
Saiyi He, an analyst from CMB International Securities, has initiated a new Buy rating on Beijing Haizhi Technology Group Co., Ltd. Class H (2706).

Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Saiyi He has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors including Haizhi’s strong position in China’s enterprise AI market and its solid growth outlook. The company is a top-five industry AI agent provider, and its revenue is projected to expand at a high-20s compound annual rate through FY28, backed mainly by rapid scaling of its Atlas AI Agent business and improving profitability.

In addition, He highlights Haizhi’s differentiated edge in graph computing and graph–LLM integration, which enables high-performance data processing and reduces hallucinations in AI applications, enhancing solution reliability. Coupled with a fast-growing domestic AI services market and a valuation benchmarked in line with global AI peers, these strengths support the initiation of coverage with a Buy rating and a target price of HK$84.5 per share.
